info.title: Go-Core API
info.description: Enterprise-grade Go boilerplate with REST API, gRPC services, and notification system

post.description: Create a new user account and send verification email
Authenticate user and return JWT tokens
Get a new access token using refresh token

get.description: Verify user email with token from query parameter
Get paginated list of user's notifications

put.description: Mark a specific notification as read

get.description: Check if service is alive (Kubernetes liveness probe)
Check if service is ready to accept requests (Kubernetes readiness probe)
Get paginated list of all roles (authentication required)

post.description: Create a new role (admin authentication required)

get.description: Get a specific role by its ID (authentication required)

post.description: Set role inheritance where child role inherits from parent role (admin authentication required)

get.description: Get a list of all permissions with pagination and optional filtering by category

post.description: Create a new permission (admin authentication required)

get.description: Get all permissions assigned to a role

post.description: Assign a permission to a role (admin authentication required)

delete.description: Remove a permission from a role (admin authentication required)

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of notification templates with optional filtering by category, language, or status

post.description: Create a new notification template with support for multiple languages and variable substitution

get.description: Retrieve a single notification template by its ID, including all variables and language versions

put.description: Update an existing notification template, including its name, description, and content

delete.description: Delete (soft delete) a notification template by its ID

post.summary: Render a template with variable substitution
post.description: Render a template by providing variables to substitute into the template content. Variables use Go template syntax: {{.VariableName}}. Helper functions available: upper, lower, capitalize, length. Example: 'Hello {{.FirstName | upper}}, your verification code is {{.VerificationCode}}'
Preview how a template will be rendered with given variables without actually saving it
Create a copy of an existing template with a new name
Create a new category for organizing notification templates
Initialize all default system templates (verification, password reset, welcome, etc.). Requires admin access.

get.description: Retrieve the most frequently used notification templates

variables.description: Key-value pairs for template variable substitution. E.g., {"FirstName": "John", "VerificationCode": "123456"}

tags.name: Roles
tags.description: Role management and role-based access control
